headline: Becton Dickinson Wins Supply Chain Honors As Valuation Appears Undemanding
summary: Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) has received multi category recognition from the Healthcare Industry Resilience Collaborative for supply chain resilience and transparency. The company reported new clinical findings for the PureWick Urine Collection System indicating improved patient outcomes. BD introduced the Liverty TIPS Stent Graft for portal hypertension, expanding its interventional liver therapy offerings. Becton Dickinson operates across medical devices, diagnostics, and interventional...
